parameters.functionCode: let item = items[0].json; if (item.body) { item = item.body; } const errors = []; const required = ["customer_name","email","phone","order_items","subtotal","tax","total","pickup_time"]; for (const field of required) { if (item[field] === undefined || item[field] === null || item[field] === "") { errors.push("Missing: " + field); } } return [{ json: { valid: errors.length === 0, error: errors.join("; ") || undefined, payload: item } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ idempotency_key: $execution.id, order: { location_id: "J4B6A3X6RYA63", reference_id: String($json.order_id), line_items: $json.square_line_items_with_tax, note: "Sales tax calculated externally", metadata: { subtotal_cents: String($json.subtotal_cents), tax_cents: String($json.tax_cents) } }, checkout_options: { redirect_url: "https://www.theutopiadeli.com/payment-confirmed" } }) }}

parameters.subject: Your Utopia Deli secure checkout link

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, order_id: $json.order_id, payment_url: $json.payment_url, payment_link: $json.payment_url, message: "Order received! Complete payment to confirm." } }}
